problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: If Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
